HGSS.686.0001:
Whenever I see a strong Trainer,
I want to be their cheerleader.\f
When I’m out on a walk,
I sometimes pick up items.\f
If I find anything, you can have it!\f
Want to give me your number?
I’ll call whenever I get anything.[0200,0000]
HGSS.686.0002: I’ll call as soon as I get anything!
HGSS.686.0003:
Really? Well, I’ll still be cheering
for you!
HGSS.686.0004:
If I find an item, you can have it!
Want to give me your number?[0200,0000]
HGSS.686.0005:
You’re here at last!
I think this will make you happy.\f
HGSS.686.0006:
You must really like phone calls to be
right nearby and using the phone!
HGSS.686.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] and I are getting more
in sync with each other.\f
We battled a wild [0100,000B,0000] and
managed to beat it in a close match.\r
We’re getting into the groove!\f
Bye! Let’s chat again!
HGSS.686.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000] and I are getting more
in sync with each other.\f
But, you know what?\f
I still haven’t caught [0100,000B,0000].
It’s getting beyond frustrating...\f
Bye! Let’s chat again!
HGSS.686.0009:
Would you be my practice partner again
sometime?\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000]...\f
Could you take it a little easier on
me next time?
HGSS.686.0010:
How soon can I expect to see you?
Don’t forget, [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.686.0011:
How soon can I expect to see you?
Don’t forget, [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.686.0012:
Sorry, I haven’t found anything useful
yet... I promise, if I find anything, you\r
can have it!
HGSS.686.0013:
I picked up something nice today.
I want you to have it, so I called!\f
You will come for it, won’t you?
[0104,0003,0000] is where I am.
HGSS.686.0014:
I’m getting really impatient, waiting to
give you my present!\f
Hurry over to [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.686.0015:
Have you heard about Team Rocket?\f
They’ve taken over the Radio Tower in
Goldenrod.\f
Are the people inside safe?
